title: aster albescens var. gracilior
intro: Aster albescens var. gracilior, also known as the white prairie aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Aster albescens var. gracilior include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
